programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: William Shatner's Weird or What?
programme.desc: Mysterious human-shaped shadow; a little boy travels hundreds of miles in a second; crystal skulls.

programme.title: William Shatner's Weird or What?
programme.desc: An earth-shattering boom; a paranormal fog on Lake Michigan; a blinding double flash of light.

programme.title: Mysteries & Monsters
programme.desc: In Southern California, Eli uncovers potential Bigfoot existence, overlooking previous research and data.

programme.title: Mysteries & Monsters

programme.title: Sasquatch Unearthed: Mountain State Monsters
programme.desc: Deep in the darkened forests of West Virginia, a legend roams; tracked by investigators like Russ Jones, Bigfoot has long been primarily thought to roam the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Sasquatch Unearthed: Mountain State Monsters

programme.title: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries

programme.desc: The Egyptian Book of the Dead, the Bhagavad Gita and the Bible.

programme.title: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries

programme.title: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries

programme.title: Sasquatch Unearthed: The Ridge

programme.title: Sasquatch Unearthed: The Ridge

programme.title: L.A. Hair

programme.title: L.A. Hair

programme.title: Kendra On Top
programme.desc: With the details of Hank's sex scandal now out in the open, Kendra heads to London for work and play. When a racy photo of Kendra and a former footballer hits the press, Hank questions if Kendra's gone too far.

programme.title: Kendra On Top
programme.desc: Despite Hank's concerns, Kendra continues her wild time in London. After a date with singer Jake Quickenden and a steamy radio interview with host Matt Edmonson, Kendra is warned not to let things go too far.

programme.title: Kendra On Top
programme.desc: Kendra questions if traditional married life is right for her. A therapy session leads to a tearful break down when she admits to texting other men after the scandal.

programme.title: David Tutera's CELEBrations
programme.desc: Actress and singer Vanessa Williams asks David to plan her bridal shower in NYC. David is starstruck by Vanessa, and must work extra hard to create an amazing event, while keeping his excitement in check.

programme.title: David Tutera's CELEBrations
programme.desc: Actor Ian Ziering (90210, Sharknado) hires David to plan a canine charity fundraiser. Can Team Tutera produce a posh event amid the puppy pandemonium? Montre has surprising news and needs David's help.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Drama is fierce as Anthony double-books China. Kim deals with her nerves while helping the biggest little diva in Hollywood prepare for the Oscars. Mikki Taylor calls on Kim for an editorial shoot.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Construction of the new salon stalls and Kim is forced to find a temporary location. The war with China takes a nasty turn. Kim styles R&B icons Brandy and Monica for a music video.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: China loses her cool with everyone in the salon, including one of the clients. Kim cuts her hair too short before her second date with Frank. China breaks down and tries to resign as a salon manager.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince
programme.desc: Vince signs new female artists but keeps it a secret from Tamar. Tamar confronts Vince about a text from a woman named Kiki. Tamar shoots a music video with friends. Logan walks in a fashion show at The Real.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince
programme.desc: Tamar feels the stress as she prepares for her upcoming tour. She's not happy with her background singers, and her biggest worry is losing her voice. Vince subs for Tamar on "The Real" while she's sick.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince
programme.desc: Tamar finally returns home from the hospital and is reunited with Logan, but must return for major surgery to remove a rib. Tamar talks to Toni about her illness, and Toni warns her to not push herself.

programme.title: Mary Mary
programme.desc: Teddy reveals more about his infidelity to Warryn, threatening Tina's marriage. Tina and Erica head to the Bahamas to perform and celebrate their birthdays and learn devastating news about their dad's health.

programme.title: Mary Mary
programme.desc: Mary Mary's cover story ignites a firestorm of controversy surrounding Tina and Teddy's relationship. Tina learns more about Teddy's infidelity. Erica stands by her sister through it all.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Ivonne le entrega a Ignacio la información de la computadora de Connie, él quiere encontrar la foto de Pedro con otra mujer. Ignacio le dice a su madre que está enamorado de Fernanda. Justino intenta manipular a Tania.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Fernanda acepta que está enamorada de Perico. Jonathan y Leonardo son víctimas de una explosión. Ignacio encuentra la foto de Leonardo con otra mujer. Una enfermera llama a Inés y le dice que tiene noticias sobre Jonathan.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Jonathan está en cuidados intensivos, pero Elmer se mete a su habitación para terminar el trabajo. Ignacio llega a la dirección donde fue tomada la foto de Leonardo con una mujer y habla con Trencha. Antes de irse reconoce a Paloma.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Ignacio se acerca a Paloma, Cachito le pregunta su nombre y él les miente. Ignacio le pagará a Elmer para que le dé información sobre Paloma. El Chamoy y su hijo se enfrentan. Leonardo le pide a Paloma que se case con él.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Paloma acepta casarse con Leonardo, pero le pide que esperen para dar la noticia. Pedro recibe a Fernanda con una sorpresa, amanecen juntos. Sara le pide a Inés que le permita a Elmer quedarse en la casa, pero Leonardo se opone.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Nora le insinúa a Fabiola que ella le esconde algo a Humberto. Le cuenta a Pedro lo que escuchó de Fabiola e Ignacio. Trencha le cuenta a Basilio que Jonathan ha muerto. Inés habla con Leonardo, sobre darle una oportunidad a Elmer.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Leonardo le cuenta a su familia que están investigando a Elmer, le dice a su hermana que lo vio en la clínica el día que Jonathan murió. Fernanda se entera de que Santiago queda en libertad. El Chamoy entra en la empresa Fuentemayor.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Basilio trata de convencer a Pedro de no decir la verdad por ahora. Ignacio le dice a Fernanda que fueron sus abogados quienes sacaron a Santiago de la cárcel. Elmer entra en la oficina de Leonardo tratando de encontrar documentos.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Elmer se encuentra con Pedro diciéndole que tienen que hablar, le dice que le pregunte a su padre por Martín Andrade. Fernanda los ve juntos y se lo cuenta a Ignacio, él le muestra unos documentos que tienen que ver con la liberación de Elmer.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Fernanda confirma que quien sacó a Elmer de la cárcel fue un hombre de dinero, no quiere ver a Pedro. Renata busca a Paloma y le pide que posponga la boda. Dan el resultado sobre la investigación la explosión, Elmer sale limpio.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Ignacio le dice a Fernanda que la ama y ella responde que solo estarán juntos por la venganza contra los Fuentemayor. Humberto le pregunta a Fabiola si aún lo ama. Ignacio intenta contactar a Elmer, pero éste no responde.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Leonardo le pide perdón a Elmer y a éste se le escapa la palabra “gemelos”, Inés lo regaña. Pedro le pregunta a Basilio sobre el abogado Martín Andrade y él le dice que aún no ha encontrado nada.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Basilio escucha la noticia de Martín Andrade y del centro de adopción ilegal abierto hace 30 años. Elmer le pide dinero a Pedro. Perico descubre que los documentos que Fernanda quería que firmara son de un acuerdo prenupcial.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro se pregunta si debe decirle a Humberto la verdad. Nora le dice a Humberto que Basilio está investigando a Martín Andrade. Connie le cuenta a Eugenio que Tania sospechaba que él la drogaba para aprovecharse de ella.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Although some would never dare to adulterate plain cheesecake, variations abound—some good, some bad, some ugly. We wanted our cheesecake to be both light and creamy, with great lemon flavor.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When entertaining, we like desserts that look more complicated to prepare than they really are. A chocolate mousse cake or chilled lemon soufflé requires basic ingredients but is sure to elicit the proper oohs and aahs from guests.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We like appetizers that deliver big flavor without much work. This means spiced nuts that are not overly sweet, spinach dip that is bold and creamy (not watery and insipid), and beef satay that is tender and vibrant.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Most cooks are under the impression that good soup takes all day to prepare. We'll show you how to make simplified versions of two favorite soups: chicken noodle and Italian pasta and bean.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Spaghetti Carbonara, Instant Mashed Potato Gnocchi; Fried Artichokes; tips for buying eggs

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Roast Pork Loin with 40 Cloves of Garlic, Orange Upside-Down Cake; review of hand mixers

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: New England Bar Pizza, Lemon Pepper Wings; Spinach and Artichoke Dip; Grill Pans

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Cuban Sandwiches; a visit to Tampa, Florida's Cuban Sandwich Festival; mustard tasting

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia shares her recipe for an easy, one-pan bratwurst dinner with tender kale and potato salad and skillet-roasted pears with caramel sauce for dessert.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia whips up her favorite fried chicken with slow-cooker buttermilk smashed potatoes, and quick collard greens with hot pepper vinegar

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia shares her recipe for easy broiled salmon with mustard and crisp dilled crust, orzo salad with cucumber, red onion, and mint, plus a pretty and pink berry fool for dessert

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia's take on comfort food includes thick-cut pork chops with smoked sea salt, garlic-scented mashed sweet potatoes with coconut milk and cilantro, a brussels sprouts and kale salad with herbs and peanuts, and her slow-cooker nutella bread pudding.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Soup for supper is an appealing concept, especially on a cold night. But for soup to work as a main course, it better be hearty. Our vibrant lentil soup fits the bill, and we round out this meal with quick cheese bread.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Some local dishes become so popular that they transcend their region. Gumbo is a taste of Louisiana in a big old bowl. And Cincinnati chili is American original, served with buttered spaghetti, kidney beans, cheddar cheese, and chopped onions.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: It sometimes seems the simplest recipes suffer the worst fate in modern cookbooks. The test kitchen was committed to breathing new life into these old-fashioned American recipes: stuffed pork chops, gravy, and glazed carrots.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We offer two inspired takes on roast chicken. Our roast lemon chicken ends with a twist. And there's nothing conventional about cooking a butterflied chicken under a brick. But these two recipes both deliver crisp skin and lots of flavors.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Quick and easy weeknight cooking can still yield great results. We start with two quick-cooking classics— sautéed chicken cutlets and pan-seared shrimp—and elevate them from the everyday.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we offer delicious, relatively straightforward fare that appeals to young and old. What kid—or adult—doesn't look forward to macaroni and cheese or barbecued chicken?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We take some of our favorite restaurant recipes—Crab Towers and Flambéed Pan-Roasted Lobster—and show you how to make them work in a home kitchen.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Huge meaty flavor—combined with spice, smoke, and fire—epitomizes Texas barbecue. Could we figure out how to make authentic Texas beef ribs in our Boston-based test kitchen?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: On occasion, we break the bank and buy a beef tenderloin. The tender, buttery interior is the big draw, and the combination of a healthy dose of seasoning and the flavor from the grill is a perfect solution to an otherwise mild-tasting piece of meat.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we prepare grilled chicken with a sweet-and-sour dipping sauce and grilled salmon with a sweet, sticky glaze.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we prepare chicken enchiladas and Mexican rice.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Sure, raw tomato sauces are fast, but if the sauce is watery and bland, who cares? Likewise, asparagus-based pasta sauces are often bland and boring. In this episode, we keep things simple while avoiding these common problems.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen prepares two Indian favorites: chicken biryani and mulligatawny soup.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pissaladière is Provençal street food, a fragrant, pizza-like tart prized for its contrast of salty black olives and anchovies against a backdrop of sweet caramelized onions and thyme. We figure out how to make a great version of this French classic.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Too often, eggplant Parmesan is a soggy, oily mess. And pasta with chicken and broccoli is heavy and bland. But after many tests in the kitchen, we've come up with recipes that give these simple, honest dishes the respect they deserve.

programme.title: American Sunrise Early Edition
programme.desc: Start your day with a fast paced rundown news style program to recap what you may have missed and what you need to know.

programme.title: American Sunrise
programme.desc: Morning news with the Real America's Voice team live from West Palm Beach, Florida.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon tries to bond with a Chimera Ant called Meleoron, even though it's risky for a Nen user to reveal his abilities.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The King is killing time as he awaits the selection. He calls upon masters of shogi and go and defeats every one of them.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Knov is making his way to the palace. The Chimera Ants Leol and Flutter follow him to try to determine his abilities, but they lose sight of him.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The King is annoyed and confounded after meeting Komugi, the unfathomable Gungi world champion. But at the same time, he is having fun.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Knov infiltrates the palace. His goal is to place the exits for his ability, the Fourth Dimensional Mansion.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yellow Temperance
programme.desc: Joseph uses his Stand to generate a spirit message from a TV, only to receive a warning claiming that Kakyoin is a traitor. Meanwhile, Jotaro, Ann and Kakyoin are out exploring Singapore when Kakyoin begins acting strangely.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: The Joestars' group arrives in India, where Polnareff is attacked by a Stand only visible through a mirror. As terrifying as it is, the Stand could also be related to his sister's murder.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Emperor and the Hanged Man Part 2
programme.desc: When Avdol is struck down defending Polnareff, the Frenchman goes into a state of shock, leaving him vulnerable. That is when "Hanged Man," Centerfold's Stand, begins its most furious attack.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Empress
programme.desc: Jotaro and the others next head toward Varanasi. On their way there, Joseph realizes his arm is quite swollen. At first, it doesn't bother him much, but the bigger it gets, the creepier it looks.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Jotaro and his group head toward Pakistan by car. Polnareff is behind the wheel on a dangerous mountain road when a mysterious vehicle starts impeding their progress.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Justice Part 1
programme.desc: After surviving another attack, Jotaro and his team make it to Pakistan, where they stop at an inn to rest. The village around the inn, however, is quiet, and its inhabitants rather odd.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Justice Part 2
programme.desc: Polnareff realizes that Enyaba is a new assassin sent by DIO. He is prevented from warning his comrades by Enyaba's Stand "Justice," which has the ability to control corpses.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Lovers Part 1
programme.desc: After surviving Enyaba's attack, Jotaro and crew make it to Pakistan's capital, Karachi. There, they encounter DIO's next assassin, Dan of Steel.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: Is Sage the true Warrior of Light?

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: A new clue reveals the mysteries of Cye.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: In their search for Kento, Mia and Sage uncover a mysterious figure on their path.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: The Ronin Warriors have Rowen in their sights.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: A pair of Chimera Ants appears and hunts Gon under the cover of night, overwhelming him with their attacks. Feeling that things are at a standstill, he gathers up his Nen and prepares to throw a punch.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Knuckle and Shoot are lying in wait for Cheetu. But just as Cheetu is about to approach them, he suddenly changes direction and disappears. Meanwhile, Killua and Gon sense that someone is following them again.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The assassin Ikalgo, an octopus-type Chimera Ant, attacks Killua with his Nen Abilities. Killua captures him and tells Ikalgo that he'll let him live if he divulges his ally's abilities.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon tries to bond with a Chimera Ant called Meleoron, even though it's risky for a Nen user to reveal his abilities.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The King is killing time as he awaits the selection. He calls upon masters of shogi and go and defeats every one of them.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Knov is making his way to the palace. The Chimera Ants Leol and Flutter follow him to try to determine his abilities, but they lose sight of him.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The King is annoyed and confounded after meeting Komugi, the unfathomable Gungi world champion. But at the same time, he is having fun.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Knov infiltrates the palace. His goal is to place the exits for his ability, the Fourth Dimensional Mansion.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yellow Temperance
programme.desc: Joseph uses his Stand to generate a spirit message from a TV, only to receive a warning claiming that Kakyoin is a traitor. Meanwhile, Jotaro, Ann and Kakyoin are out exploring Singapore when Kakyoin begins acting strangely.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: The Joestars' group arrives in India, where Polnareff is attacked by a Stand only visible through a mirror. As terrifying as it is, the Stand could also be related to his sister's murder.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques dealer Paul Martin makes his Road Trip debut alongside seasoned tripper Raj Bisram. A mysterious giant and very cute dog also feature in this South Downs adventure.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The Road Trip continues in Wiltshire for debutant Paul Martin and seasoned chum Raj Bisram. Will a gamble buy of antique jelly moulds cause an auction wobble for one expert?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram and Paul Martin explore antique shops in the West Country. At auction an expensive biscuit tin leaves a foul taste while a cheap oil painting makes an impression.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques expert chums, Raj Bisram and Paul Martin take their open-topped motor to Dorset, Devon, Somerset and beyond. Will they make profits at the Worcestershire auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram and Paul Martin reach Shakespeare country, to buy or not to buy? Plus, they meet alpacas and do some ballet. Expect Incas, tutus and tights.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: A new Road Trip sees Steven Moore find some pricey porcelain in an antique shop loo, while Natasha Raskin Sharp disappears down a secret tunnel on a journey back in time.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Northumberland sees Natasha on safari tracking ancient creatures while Steven finds an old elephant. Both experts go Georgian with their treasures going under the gavel in Dundee.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Steven and Natasha visit the Scottish Borders. They reveal the hidden past of the Roman Empire and an antique hiding a secret. Expect more surprises at the Edinburgh auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The Scottish antique buying adventure continues for Steven and Natasha. The pricey purchase of some militaria proves costly, and an unassuming lantern attracts big bids.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: A trip through Scotland sees Natasha get to grips with haggis and Steven falls for an exquisite French lady. It's the last auction of this adventure, who will take Road Trip crown?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: A new adventure for Izzie Balmer and Philip Serrell, who scour the shops of Kent in search of antiques. Expect rocking horse riding, cat whispering and disagreements about scarves.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Back on the road with Izzie Balmer and Phil Serrell as they hunt for elusive antique treasures. A gamble on some brown furniture may prove profitable at the Hertfordshire auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Izzie Balmer and Phil Serrell are driving through a downpour in Oxfordshire on the trail of treasures. Will a long-lost saucer or designer brooch most excite the Harrogate auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Gloves off and weapons at the ready as experts Izzie Balmer and Philip Serrell scour the shops of Staffordshire and Shropshire. But who will be left standing at the auction?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In a special episode from the Somme, the team hears stories of courage in wartime.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a carved coconut and a frog-shaped brooch.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a collection of cut-throat razors and a Tiffany mosaic.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a Rolex that James Bond would be proud of and an old train ticket.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A look back at some of the year's highlights and updates on some memorable items.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a sweetheart brooch, a Victorian penknife, and secret D-Day documents.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include an art deco pendant with a hint of Egypt and some charming tiles.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a miniature kitchen range, a merchant's ring, and a sextant.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a miniature piano with a secret and a sketch by LS Lowry.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include Chairman Mao memorabilia and a purse that hides a secret weapon.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a 400-year-old Japanese chest and a walnut with a secret.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a mysterious letterbox and a stuffed dog with an aristocratic pedigree.

programme.desc: The Bad Girls put their drama aside when their best friends come to visit; while Zee sets her sights on personal growth, Kaila and Kandyce go head to head, resulting in another empty bed in the house.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Social Disruption

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Social Disruption
programme.desc: When Brynesha does not reciprocate Kandyce's deepening affections, the two girls face off; Kabrina gets real with her roommates; the whole house lets loose for a sexy slumber party.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Social Disruption
programme.desc: Tensions remain high between Kandyce and Brynesha; one house mate decides to leave early; a comedy roast lightens the mood; the Bad Girls go big for their final night.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Social Disruption
programme.desc: Tanisha enlists the help of Social Media Maven, Erica Mena backstage; archrivals Kaila and Kandyce face off on the reunion stage; Brynesha and Zee prove that in some cases time can't heal all wounds.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Social Disruption
programme.desc: Tanisha and Erica Mena return for Part Two and the Bad Girls of Season 16 learn what happens when one crosses the OG host; Kailie confronts her tormentors, Kaila and Tabatha, leading to an unexpected twist.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: East Meets West

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: East Meets West

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: East Meets West
programme.desc: Keyaira's temper gets put to the test when Kiyanna hits below the belt; a new girl arrives and makes quick enemies when she chooses a side; Seven and Deshayla focus on their career goals.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: East Meets West
programme.desc: Francesca's disapproval of Briana's wild antics leads to an explosive night; Kiyanna sets up a romantic night of matchmaking for the girls.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: East Meets West

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: East Meets West

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep22
programme.desc: Catalina es informada por el médico que no puede volver a utilizar implantes por lo menos en un lapso de dos años. Marcial presenta a Jessica como su nueva esposa. El capitán Salgado es asesinado. Jessica se despide de su amiga con una excusa.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep23
programme.desc: Catalina visita a su familia. La mujer se ve con Pelambre, se entera el romance de Marcial y Jessica. La mujer le pide al guardaespaldas matar a Jessica en un restaurante, sin embargo Catalina se hace pasar por ella y es asesinada en vez de la Diabla

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep1
programme.desc: Conozca la historia de Catalina, una joven que cegada por su ambición y las malas influencias llegará a un paraíso al que jamás desearía haber entrado.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep2
programme.desc: Albeiro es seducido por el cuerpo de la madre de Catalina. Catalina es violada en el establo por los hombres de Mariño. Bairon rechaza a Jimena pues él se percata que ella se va diariamente como acompañante con los mafiosos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep3
programme.desc: Bairon es atacado, el hombre se oculta en la casa de su madre Hilda. Caballo busca a Catalina para matarla y que no se entere su patrón que él le quito la virginidad a la mujer. Albeiro le propone matrimonio a su novia. La Diabla habla con los capos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep4
programme.desc: La Diabla le consigue las modelos a Cardona y Morón. Albeiro le propone a Catalina irse a vivir juntos, ella lo rechaza. Catalina se entera de que está embarazada y aborta. Jessica lleva a su amiga a una fiesta de modelos realizada por mafiosos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep5
programme.desc: Catalina se separa de Albeiro por un tiempo por lo último que le ha ocurrido. Cardona se acuesta con Catalina, la mujer le pide dinero al mafioso para la operación de sus senos. Caballo es asesinado. Cardona le pide a la niña que sea su amante

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep6
programme.desc: Cardona le da el dinero a Catalina, la mujer junto a la Diabla averiguan la cotización de la operación de su busto. Hilda se emborracha con Albeiro. Orlando es asesinado. Catalina se encuentra con su novio y su madre ebrios, se enfada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep7
programme.desc: Catalina le declara su amor a Albeiro, sin embargo le aclara el no poder volver junto a él en estos momentos. Catalina se encuentra en un bar con Cardona y el Titi, Cardona le da dinero para que siga siendo su amante. Albeiro duerme con Hilda.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep8
programme.desc: Bairon asesina a una persona como sicario en su nueva profesión. Catalina se enfada con Cardona al enterarse de que el mafioso huyo del país por el allanamiento que hizo la policía. Jessica y Catalina viajan a Bogotá en busca de oportunidades laborales.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep9
programme.desc: Las amigas de la Diabla y Catalina empiezan a trabajar en un prostíbulo tras la mala situación económica que hay en el pueblo. Catalina tiene sexo con el Dr. Mauricio para que le ponga los implantes de seno. Albeiro e Hilda tienen una relación.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep10
programme.desc: Benjamín les exige sexo a las mujeres por la estadía, las chicas cachetean al hombre. Jessica y Catalina se refugian en una estación de policía, empeñan las joyas que le robaron al antiguo anfitrión. Mauricio evade a Catalina en la clínica.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep11
programme.desc: Hilda le declara su amor a Albeiro, los dos hacen el amor. Bairon se percata de lo sucedido y acepta el noviazgo de su madre con el supuesto novio de Catalina. La familia celebra el cumpleaños de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep12
programme.desc: Catalina hace el amor con Albeiro después de embriagarlo para que no se note la pérdida de su virginidad. Catalina y Jessica se devuelven a Bogotá. El hombre oscuro contrata a Bairon para matar a un político.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep13
programme.desc: El hombre oscuro le da la misión a Bairon y a su compañero de eliminar al magistrado con un tiempo límite de un mes. Catalina seduce a Octavio. El hombre las echa de la casa. Las mujeres se encuentran con el doctor para la cirugía de los senos.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The Tradewinds bar could shut down for good if Jon can't get a lazy stepson to step into his new role as manager.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must help a Yankee family learn to do business in the South if he hopes to save the poorly themed Characters Quarters in North Carolina.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Bar Rescue first, Taffer must resurrect a closed neighborhood bar by reigniting the passion of the burnt-out firefighter who owns it.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: When the owner of an outdated college sports bar would rather spend his time playing fantasy football, Jon gives him a dose of reality.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon brings his team to The Palace, a Moroccan-themed bar and restaurant in Upland, CA, where one owner puts the business at risk by drinking the inventory and refusing to try new ideas.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon knew family-run Ohio bar The Black Sheep was in trouble before he arrived, but even he's surprised by the true nature of the bar's debt.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: TJ Quills has a troublesome reputation for serving minors, which can only be resolved if Jon is able to convince the owner to give up his frat boy ways.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Layton, Utah, Jon confronts Brandon, the emotionally exhausted owner of Linda Lou's Time for Two, who has bled himself and his mother dry trying to keep the bar open.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Despite initial success, the owner of Longshots lost control of his feuding bar staff and may soon lose his house if Jon can't turn things around.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon drops in on the lively Bottoms Up Bar and Grill in Stanton, California, to teach the owner's son how to manage a rowdy atmosphere while still keeping patrons happy.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A 40-year-old dive bar in California is on the brink of collapse, and Jon must decide if the owner should stay in charge as manager or cede power to his daughter.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A former psychologist turned bar owner attempts to run a Detroit jazz club, but her interfering family and lazy staff have her seeking counseling from Jon.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The obnoxious behavior of two feuding brothers threatens to put an end to the storied legacy of Royal Oaks, the oldest bar and barbecue joint in Youngstown, Ohio.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Feuding bikini-clad bartenders wreak havoc on a California sports bar where the owner is more focused on partying than running a business.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: John D. Cort, Mitch's friend and a former lifeguard, returns to Baywatch where his life undergoes a devastating change. Meanwhile, Hobie meets a very "unique" new friend.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Summer has love problems when Slade returns from a world surfing tour to discover Matt and Summer are dating. CJ is persistently pursued by a bungee jumping balloonist. Meanwhile, Garner patrols the beach on horseback.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A prison break gone awry finds Mitch held hostage by a beautiful woman and forced to perform surgery on her escaped convict husband. Meanwhile, Matt and Slade decide to settle their mutual affection for Summer in a daring surfing contest.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch removes a bullet from an escaped convict, only to realize that he and his wife have every intention of killing him. Stephanie's sister Caroline arrives with her fiancé, who becomes the target of an attempted murder.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch saves two boys from drowning. But when one ends up in a coma, Mitch suffers from PTSD and is left reevaluating his life as a lifeguard.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch's impending birthday prompts him to train for an ironman competition, getting swept off his feet by a younger woman along the way. Matt takes a night job to save money for a motorcycle, jeopardizing his coworkers through his exhaustion.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A new lifeguard helps Mitch and the Baywatch lifeguards confront an upsurge in gang activity, and CJ is enamored with a beach magician who nearly drowns during a bungled underwater stunt.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The Baywatch lifeguards stage a beach-oriented Special Olympics, becoming involved with two young physically-challenged athletes whose parents have abandoned them.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Jesse Majors, the beautiful motorcycle racer that Matt fell in love with, returns, putting strain on Matt and Summer’s relationship.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: An ad hoc reunion of elite 1950s lifeguards, the "Red Knights," triggers a bar brawl and Ben's resignation. Meanwhile, Mitch helps deliver a baby when the mother goes into premature labor while swimming at the beach.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The Baywatch lifeguards travel to San Diego for a week where Summer is haunted by the hotel's legendary ghost. CJ grows attached to an orphaned dolphin at Sea World. And Mitch is stranded at sea with his brother when their sailboat capsizes.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Adrift in the ocean with his semi-conscious brother, Mitch struggles to keep himself and Buzzy alive through the long, cold night. CJ unites an orphaned dolphin with its injured mother, and Summer becomes obsessed with a passionate ghost.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A beautiful woman and her plain sister compete for Mitch's affection with perilous results. Matt confronts the sudden onset of a paralyzing fear of sharks, that may in reality be a far different fear.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: An investigative reporter is working on a story which details the sale of U.S. military technology by businessman Edward Falcon. The story is so incriminating that her life is put at risk. Can the Baywatch team help her get out alive?

programme.title: Bellator 237: Fedor vs Rampage
programme.desc: East meets West when Bellator MMA invades Tokyo with a stacked card that features MMA superstar Fedor Emelianenko and Rampage Jackson colliding in a long-awaited showdown. Also in action are Bellator stars Michael Chandler and Michael “MVP” Page.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to the Forum in LA. Darrion Caldwell takes on Adam Borics in the quarter-finals of the Featherweight World Grand Prix. In the main event, Julia Budd defends her Featherweight World Title against Cris Cyborg.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Known for their impressive fast finishes, 'Easy' Ed Ruth meets undefeated Yaroslav Amosov in anything but an easy fight as the two face off in the welterweight main event.

programme.title: Bellator 242: Bandejas vs Pettis
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is back from the Mohegan Sun Arena with a night of fast-paced action as Sergio Pettis battles Ricky Bandejas in a bantamweight title-elimination fight, while Jason Jackson clashes with dangerous veteran Jordan Mein at welterweight.

programme.title: Bellator 243: Chandler vs Henderson II
programme.desc: Former MMA World Champions Michael Chandler and Benson Henderson look to settle things once and for all after their first unforgettable battle ended in a razor-thin split decision in Chandler’s favor.

programme.title: Bellator 244: Bader vs Nemkov
programme.desc: It's a highly anticipated battle for light heavyweight supremacy as double-champ Ryan Bader puts his 205 lb. title on the line against Vadim Nemkov.

programme.title: Bellator 245: Machida vs Davis
programme.desc: A long-awaited rematch between two of the best light heavyweights in the world. Phil “Mr. Wonderful” Davis collides with Lyoto “The Dragon” Machida in battle.

programme.title: Bellator 246: Archuleta vs Mix
programme.desc: A bantamweight world title is on the line as hard-charging Juan “The Spaniard” Archuleta collides with undefeated submission machine Patchy “No Love” Mix.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: From the Mohegan Sun Arena, reigning Bellator Lightweight and Featherweight World Champion Patricio Pitbull defends his title against the relentless Emmanuel 'El Matador' Sanchez in a long awaited rematch.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to the Mohegan Sun Arena. Reigning Bellator Heavyweight World Champion and former Bellator Light Heavyweight World Champion Ryan 'Darth' Bader takes on MMA leg-end Lyoto 'The Dragon' Machida in a rematch over eight years in the making.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ben says his wife, Kelly gained a significant amount of weight, is no longer affectionate & stopped cleaning & cooking his favorite meals 6 mos after marrying. Kelly says Ben lost 100 lbs, then became a "narcissist" & a "jerk" Can this marriage be saved?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mom Anita & daughter Alexa say an incident 3 years ago left the family shattered: an ex-husband, a loaded gun, a little boy caught between parents & now an ex-mother-in-law who says her son is blameless & is going to court for grandson visitation rights.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Monet Monico, 19, was fast becoming an acting & singing sensation, but just 2 years later, her family says the Hollywood hopeful has become a homeless heroin addict. Facing her family for the first time in 6 months, will Monet accept help?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The Monster-In-Law is back! Khalood confessed to calling her son-in-law, Steve, a "loser" and "dumbass" and lacing his drink with a laxative! Does she still say Steve is incapable of supporting a family? Hear what Steve’s mom has to say about the feud!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Sandi, 60, discussing her online relationship with Peter, 22. Dr. Phil speaks to Peter in Nigeria via satellite & he insists he loves Sandi. Will Sandi listen to her daughters' concerns, or will she fly to Nigeria to marry Peter?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: What's a woman to do when her spouse is constantly standing over her shoulder and nitpicking everything she does.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Marissa, 22, says her family treated her like an outcast in childhood & she later began working as an escort to make ends meet. Marissa faces family for the first time in 3 years on Dr. Phil's stage. Did they indeed reject her & is there hope for repair?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A severe case of Munchausen syndrome by proxy leads to murder. Gypsy Rose Blanchard decided that killing her own mother was her only way to escape years of abuse. She reveals her story to Dr. Phil in an exclusive interview.Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil's guests engage in a heated debate about the rights of men and women when a child is conceived out of wedlock. Should the biological father be forced to pay child support for a child he didn't know existed or did not plan?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Megan, her ex-boyfriend, Andy and his fiancee Caitlin, who have presented Dr. Phil with evidence supporting their allegation that it is Megan's own lifestyle & choices keeping her out of her son's life. Who is telling the truth?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Waco & Alley left their home state with their 3-year-old child, missing a custody hearing, & have no idea the court then granted guardianship to Waco's parents. Tensions run high when Dr. Phil reveals to Waco & Alley they lost custody of their child!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brad says he can't choose between his wife, Michele, and his girlfriend, who's calling herself "Sarah" to protect her identity. Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC sigue en Arizona investigando acerca de la vida familiar del sospechoso, el cual tenía un gemelo idéntico, pero la madre nunca se lo dijo a la policía.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un francotirador dispara en Dallas, la BAU investiga si el próximo aniversario del asesinato de Kennedy es un factor de motivación, pero descubrirán que en realidad va a matar la mujer de quien lo contrato.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC conoce a su nuevo jefe, Mateo Cruz, un antiguo conocido de JJ. Cruz se une al equipo mientras peinan las calles de Baltimore en busca de un sospechoso que deja a las víctimas incapaces de comunicarse.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La vida real
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se enfrentan a una investigación de homicidio de hace un año que Maggie (Callie Thorne), la médium que anteriormente les ayudó a resolver un caso, trae a su atención.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La lista negra
programme.desc: Frank y Erin se encuentran en una encrucijada cuando se enteran de que la oficina del fiscal guarda una lista de policías de Nueva York que consideran «poco fiables».

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Detrás de la sonrisa
programme.desc: La estima de Frank por una vieja amiga y difunta dama de la alta sociedad resulta ser un error cuando su hijo amenaza con revelar públicamente quién era en realidad.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Otra mirada
programme.desc: Frank se toma a pecho uno de los casos de Jamie cuando se trata de la sospechosa muerte de la esposa de su amigo, el agente del FBI Wilson Ortega (Emiliano Diez), quién tenía una enfermedad terminal.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras buscan al brutal asesino de un marine, el equipo de NCIS y Gibbs se encuentran enfrentándose nuevamente al agente del FBI Fornell.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un marine hallado en su garaje lleva a sospechar al protegido del FBI, Tobias Fornell. La investigación se intensifica cuando el sospechoso huye de un nuevo crimen. Ziva, mientras planea sus vacaciones, descubre una foto misteriosa.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga un crimen durante la temporada de Halloween, donde un asesino psicótico deja pistas sobre la identidad de su próxima víctima en la red.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs se enfrenta a un desafío cuando Vance le asigna un nuevo asistente novato para investigar un caso de robo a un banco. La tensión aumenta mientras Gibbs y su nuevo compañero tratan de resolver el crimen y superar sus diferencias en el camino.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Arizona a investigar una serie de crímenes metódicos ocurridos a mujeres, el final es desconcertante. Dentro del equipo también se vive incertidumbre porque Hotch puede ser el remplazo de Strauss quien murió en la temporada pasada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC sigue en Arizona investigando acerca de la vida familiar del sospechoso, el cual tenía un gemelo idéntico, pero la madre nunca se lo dijo a la policía.

programme.title: Mentes criminales

programme.title: Redneck Island

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Bullets fly as the rednecks shoot their way through another difficult challenge. As a new power couple emerges in the game, another team's new romance is put in jeopardy as they face elimination in The Pit.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The rednecks must face their fears as the challenge takes them to new heights. A newly formed team must learn how to work together both on and off the playing field.

programme.title: Redneck Island

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The team bonds are tested when the Rednecks must rely on each other's strength and endurance to win the challenge. A new romance develops and causes controversy in the house.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: A late-night prank angers the house and puts huge targets on the prankster's backs. The rednecks have a hard time keeping down what Steve is dishing up at the challenge and then a grudge match is settled at The Pit.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The pressures of the game are getting to some of the contestants and a wild night out causes tempers to flare. This week's challenge proves to be too much for two of the players to handle.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Tensions boil over as a relationship continues to create friction in the house. The rednecks must prove they have brains as well as brawn as the latest challenge puts them to the test.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Down to the final 4 teams, the remaining rednecks plot to take out whoever stands in their way of making it to the end. At the challenge, the players put it all on the line as they overcome any obstacles standing in their way.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Having survived the competition so far, the day they've all been waiting for arrives as the final three teams battle it out in an epic race of strength, intelligence, and endurance.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Brian Boucher is passionate about three things: trucking, family, and racing. Brian's away from his wife and two kids for months at a time so the boys transform Brian's beat-down Volvo into a well-oiled machine fit for any racing fan!

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Josh Mullen is a musician who's doing everything he can to make it in the music business. As his band plays gigs all over the Midwest, the boys turn Josh's beat-down band van into a bodacious 1950s beach woody that'll be sure to turn heads on the road.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Lance Burk is the young owner of a feed delivery business and he really enjoys being his own boss. For the first time ever, the boys team up with Hollywood to transform Lance's old Kenworth into the Iron Man truck influenced by the blockbuster film.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Driving a truck is the only career David Goad has ever wanted and he considers it his job to help keep America's economy rolling. David's kids contact the boys and get them to turn David's worn-out Kenworth into a tribute to America's Old West.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted suspect tries to hide from officers, a woman calls deputies to apprehend her hostile husband, and a passenger tries to outrun the police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man caught with a stolen moped attempts to run while handcuffed. Police find a man with his pants down behind a business. A suspect found asleep in his poorly parked car complains of sciatic pain.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies work together to stay on the tail of a fleeing vehicle. An argumentative driver keeps his friends tuned in as he livestreams his own arrest. A mother’s desire to scare her daughter into behaving takes a serious turn.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase involves tire spikes, shredded rubber, and crashed gates. Suspects accused of burglary state they only steal to pay rent. A traffic stop proves there’s always more than meets the eye.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An injured suspect spots his window of opportunity, a man tries to order officers around who caught him with unsavory items, and detectives catch someone in a sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with a suspended license flees a routine traffic stop on foot. Deputies respond to a battered woman after receiving a 911 hang up call. A sting operation nets a suspected drug dealer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman makes a desperate attempt to frame her friend right in front of deputies. A driver’s assortment of containers raises some questions. A man in possession of a stolen truck insists that his friend is the one at fault.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspected jewelry thieves attempt a daring escape during a pursuit, a man gives officers a challenge during his arrest, and a traffic stop puts a marriage in jeopardy.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man accused of burglary claims he’s hallucinating. A suspect tries to show off by parading his white pistol and causes pandemonium. A traffic stop offers an accused man a second chance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy calls for backup when he's outnumbered, a former Marine damages his neighbors' property, and a husband and wife are separated after their vehicle is searched.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An open container and crack pipe are discovered inside a teen's vehicle. Officers find a man at a nearby residence lifting weights after trying to evade police. A fight involving two men and a shovel is broken up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A foot pursuit ends in arrest after a suspected drug dealer attempts to discard his goods. Police are called to a warehouse after the security guard is held at gunpoint. Police assist a young girl after being struck by a car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect with a suspended license claims he’s not drunk. Officers track an armed robber. An armed and dangerous suspect hides from officers in an apartment complex.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a fight in progress involving mace at a minimart, and a woman tells police that her boyfriend threatened to flush her late husband's ashes down the drain.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gets Tased while resisting arrest, police interrupt a transaction going down in a parked vehicle, and a man fired from his job vents his anger at a gas station.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop takes a surprising turn when a suspect creates a spur-of-the-moment diversion, and a soft-spoken driver has difficulty being upfront with the officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young carjacking suspect in custody gets a tongue-lashing from his mom and aunt, a man terrorizing his mom gets tased, and police give chase to a familiar vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An inebriated man is arrested after getting caught peering through the window of a recovery center. After a foot chase officers bring down a well-known local felon. Police respond to a domestic dispute at a local mobile home park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate suspicious activity in a known drug area, officers encounter a jaywalker with the munchies, and a woman caught with meth wants points for honesty.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A person in a wheelchair gets the better of a possible assailant, a domestic argument escalates to biting, and a man who cuts off a patrolman goes on the offensive.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young man receives a wake-up call when police catch him breaking the law, and officers play peacemakers after a board game sparks a family feud.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver takes his unsuspecting passenger on a wild ride as he tries to evade police, a man's date is cut short by a traffic stop, and police are called to evict a roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue a man who attempted to cash a bad check then fled the scene. Police are called when a man’s ex-girlfriend breaks into his house. Police chase an unlicensed teen speeding in a vehicle

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are called to a burglary at a warehouse housing expensive items. Police are called to the scene of a threatening man with a knife. Officers thwart an attempted suicide during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers split up to interrogate two men suspected of stealing a pick-up truck, a motorist tries to ditch a bag of meth, and police discover a bunch of syringes in a vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man wrecks his friend's car while fleeing police, detectives arrest a man wanted for armed robbery and attempted murder, and officers spy a subject who eluded them earlier.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a highspeed pursuit of a stolen vehicle. Police contact the Fire Department and alert the guests when they spot a motel fire. Officers pursue a suspect on a stolen motorcycle.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is called in to investigate a murder and robbery at a poker game that had more than a million dollars in chips on the table.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a fire at a music venue that leaves four people dead, including two band members.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When contestants on a reality cooking show accidentally eat human flesh during a competition, the CSI team is brought in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine Willows returns to help the CSIs solve a cold case that has haunted the team for 14 years, on the milestone 300th episode.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a homeless man who had a huge winning streak at a small casino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a John Doe found during torrential rains in Vegas. Meanwhile, Greg Sanders is investigated and accused of framing a man for murder seven years ago.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a man is found dead inside a human-sized hamster ball, the CSI team is brought in to investigate. Also, the team collaborates with a swing shift CSI on a case involving a serial rapist.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is called in to investigate the stabbing of a couple found at a local motel that is reminiscent of two incidents that occurred in the same room.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A spa weekend for Sara, Finlay and Morgan turns into a murder investigation and missing persons case when Finlay disappears, as the CSI team must piece together what happened in detail to find her.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a man is found murdered at an elaborate holiday party complete with real snow and live reindeer, the CSI team is brought in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A petty crime aboard an inbound plane to Vegas becomes a murder investigation when one of the passengers is found dead.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs are called to investigate a car crash and are shocked to discover the victim is someone they know.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team works two separate investigations, one involving a woman found murdered in Mexico and another of a local couple found dead in their driveway, they find that the evidence in one case may help the other.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Nick and Greg investigate the death of a 16-year-old girl with ties to a brothel.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos hermosas mujeres son asesinadas en un hotel de Las Vegas y los CSI descubren a un asesino inusual durante su investigación.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se adentra en el mundo del golf profesional cuando se descubre el cuerpo de un jugador legendario durante un torneo de alto nivel.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El caso de dos estudiantes de secundaria, uno muerto y el otro desaparecido, llevan a los CSI a unas carreras callejeras de coches y a su complicada red de competición mortal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Rascal Flatts toma el centro del escenario cuando un miembro de la banda es electrocutado por su propia guitarra durante un concierto, el equipo de CSI investiga si fue un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un niño pequeño es encontrado asesinado, el equipo de CSI descubre evidencia que puede vincular su muerte con un viejo caso que resurgió recientemente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine y el detective Vartann pasan 24 horas juntos en una habitación de hotel mientras vigilan a un dúo que fabrica drogas en la habitación de al lado.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga el brutal asesinato de una familia, rastrean al asesino hasta la casa de al lado, que podría pertenecer al asesino en serie "Dr. Jekyll".

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Hodges y Wendy llevan a un grupo de exploradores de CSI de la escuela secundaria a una excursión, embellecen su papel en la resolución de casos y llevan su tarea un poco demasiado lejos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un estudiante es descubierto asesinado en la escuela de Lindsey, la investigación da un giro brusco cuando el equipo de CSI descubre una conexión poco probable entre la muerte del niño y atrocidades del pasado.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un cómico legendario de los viejos tiempos de Las Vegas se reunirá con su compañero en el escenario solo por una noche, hasta que uno de ellos es encontrado muerto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una madre que se pensaba que estaba de duelo por la pérdida de su familia hace tres años se convierte en sospechosa en una investigación de CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI debe investigar a uno de los suyos cuando Langston es acusado por un antiguo colega de ser parte de los asesinatos del Dr. Jekyll. Primera parte de dos del final de temporada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Las vidas del equipo de CSI están en juego a medida que se acercan al escurridizo Dr. Jekyll, y es posible que más de un miembro del equipo no viva para ver su captura. Segunda parte del final de temporada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston lucha por su vida después de ser apuñalado por un psicópata, Nate Haskell, mientras que los otros CSI asisten a un funeral que se vuelve mortal.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When an innocent boy's life is in danger, Ryan is eventually forced to betray Horatio Caine and the rest of the CSI team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A murder case involving extreme plastic surgery leads Horatio Caine to Ron Saris, who is alive and seeking revenge on Julia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a reality star is murdered, Horatio Caine and the CSI team delve into the scandalous, sexy world of a TV dating show.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine and the CSI team, work to figure out why a seemingly normal family was targeted in a brutal grenade attack.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the case of a man boiled alive, Julia spirals out of control, and one of the team's darkest secrets comes to light.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio fights to save Yelina and when Delko goes against Calleigh's plea and helps his dangerous father, his life is put in jeopardy.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: As Delko's life hangs in the balance, Horatio flashes back 12 years to reveal how Miami's CSIs first met and became a team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the lab is attacked, Horatio must fulfill a gunman's unique request in order to save five hostages, including new CSI Jesse Cardoza.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Three volleyball players mysteriously drop dead on the court, while Calleigh's testimony against Delko threatens his future as a CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the most hated man in Miami is murdered, Horatio Caine and the CSI team go on the hunt for his killer and his hidden treasure.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alexx Woods and Eric Delko return to help Horatio Caine and the CSI team stop a deadly viral outbreak in beautiful Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine and the CSI team recreate a night of bachelor party debauchery in order to solve a murder and find a missing groom.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine calls Las Vegas CSI Dr. Ray Langston to come to Miami when a severed leg found in the Everglades is discovered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio and the CSI team investigate who or what caused a horrific car accident, both drivers' darkest secrets are revealed.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un bienhechor del vecindario es asesinado, Horatio y el equipo de CSI descubren que él estaba planeando denunciar algo importante.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el Atormentador de Miami vuelve a matar, Horatio se encuentra cara a cara con la matriarca de la familia del presunto asesino, que puede o no ayudar en su investigación.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando casi matan a un amado entrenador de tenis, Calleigh descubre un vínculo personal con el caso.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio descubre un escándalo de corrupción que lo enfrenta a un viejo adversario y Calleigh toma una decisión que le cambiará la vida.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a uno de los mayores enemigos del equipo de CSI, Horatio debe determinar cuál de los miembros de su equipo es sospechoso.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Megan Donner regresa a la unidad de CSI a tiempo para trabajar en un accidente de avión en los Everglades. Descubren una víctima a ocho kilómetros del accidente.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que los pescadores capturan a un tiburón tigre y descubren parte de un torso humano en su estómago, la evidencia lleva al equipo a sospechar de un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando se produce una violación y un asesinato en una playa de Miami, envían a Horatio y al equipo a investigar la mansión de la familia Hamilton.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando su mentor muere mientras desactiva una bomba, Horatio emprende una misión personal para encontrar al culpable. Megan se pregunta si ese caso no es demasiado íntimo para él.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un sacerdote es asesinado, Horatio y el equipo deben investigar. Una huella de labios en un vaso señala a un monaguillo de 12 años como el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una niña de cinco años es asesinada en un restaurante/área de juegos que atiende a padres e hijos, y Horatio y el equipo deben investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo investigan el asesinato de un stripper encontrado muerto después de una fiesta sexual femenina. La evidencia sugiere que tuvo relaciones sexuales antes de su muerte.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una familia es asesinada en su casa, Horatio y el equipo intentan encontrar al asesino con las pruebas dejadas en el lugar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Tres personas son asesinadas a tiros en el centro de Miami durante la hora pico y Horatio y el equipo deben atrapar al asesino rápidamente.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Stella, and Lindsay discover why a young dancer with a winning lottery ticket in her pocket was thrown from the Roosevelt Bridge Island Tram.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When murder comes to play at a high-stakes poker game, the CSIs work to find out why what they thought was a cheater’s revenge was misidentification.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: In a New York doll “hospital”, Mac and Danny recover the corpse of the doll “doctor” beneath hundreds of body parts – doll body parts.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A rising roller derby star drops dead in the middle of a bout, and Mac and Stella come to the rink to investigate the death.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A billionaire is found dead in his bedroom, when Danny begins to process the scene he trips a panic button, sealing himself in with the victim.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the death of two models at New York City’s hottest fashion show-- where all of the clothes consist of nothing but body paint.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a prank gone bad when a “subway surfer” met with the ultimate wipeout, but soon understand that the death was no accident.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella thinks she has finally caught a night off, but the host of a private art show she’s attending is skewered with a high tech bow and arrow.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella and Mac examine a case in which a man was shot to death as a result of one of New York City’s dangerous water gun wars.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in her apartment building’s water tower, Mac and Lindsay must team up to find who her killer was.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Prueba de honor (S9 Ep8)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI debe adentrarse en el mundo de alta presión de las escuelas preparatorias de elite cuando un estudiante es asesinado mientras estudia para el examen de ingreso a la universidad.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Código sangriento (S9 Ep9)
programme.desc: Cuando descubren que la detective Lovato es una agente encubierta, el equipo de CSI investiga a la pandilla callejera latina en la que ella se infiltró.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Fantasmas del pasado (S9 Ep10)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York investiga un bar clandestino inspirado en la década de 1920 cuando asesinan a uno de sus dueños y desaparecen 10.000 dólares.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Control P (S9 Ep11)

programme.desc: Chris Klein, LL Cool J y Rebecca Romijn-Stamos forman parte del mejor equipo del brutal deporte del Rollerball. Cuando descubren que el propietario de la liga (Jean Reno) hará lo que sea por la audiencia, se prepararán para acabar con el deporte.

programme.title: Lluvia de fuego
programme.desc: Cuando una explosión sacude a Boston, el experto en escuadrones de bombas Jimmy Dove (Jeff Bridges) se ve inmerso en el trabajo más desgarrador de su carrera.

programme.title: Instinto predador
programme.desc: Un cazador (Nicolas Cage) debe luchar por su vida en un barco cuando sus mortíferos animales -entre ellos un raro jaguar blanco- son soltados por un peligroso criminal que quiere matar a todos a bordo.

programme.title: Vuelo nocturno
programme.desc: Al poco tiempo de despegar, el compañero de asiento de Lisa, Jackson, le revela la verdadera razón de su presencia. Forma parte de un plan para asesinar a un empresario rico y poderoso...y Lisa es la clave para lograrlo.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: Un policía fuerte (Jason Statham, "Fast & Furious 7") es designado para atrapar a un asesino en serie que ataca a oficiales de policía. Con Paddy Considine, Aiden Gillen, Mark Rylance y Luke Evans.

programme.title: El Robo más Grande de la Historia
programme.desc: Basada en una historia real, Dwayne Johnson interpreta a un detective de la policía de Nueva York que intenta resolver el mayor robo de dinero de la historia de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Vuelo nocturno
programme.desc: Al poco tiempo de despegar, el compañero de asiento de Lisa, Jackson, le revela la verdadera razón de su presencia. Forma parte de un plan para asesinar a un empresario rico y poderoso...y Lisa es la clave para lograrlo.

programme.title: Gueros
programme.desc: Sombra y Santos han estado en el limbo mientras su universidad está en huelga, pero su rutina se ve interrumpida por la llegada del hermano menor de Sobra, quien los convence de localizar a su ídolo de la infancia.

programme.title: Divina confusión
programme.desc: Comedia mexicana llena de estrellas donde el amor de hoy en día recibe un empujoncito por parte de poderes de lo más alto.

programme.title: Aquí entre nos
programme.desc: Cansado de que su esposa y sus tres hijas lo tomen por sentado, Rodolfo Guerra se despierta una mañana y decide no ir a trabajar. Luego empieza la locura.

programme.title: No eres tú, soy yo
programme.desc: Después de la ruptura de su reciente matrimonio, Javier se encuentra en una depresión de la que ni siquiera un psiquiatra puede ayudarlo a salir. Sin embargo, la esperanza está en camino en la forma improbable de sus exnovias.

programme.title: El Crimen del Padre Amaro LAS
programme.desc: La política y las pasiones sexuales amenazan con corromper a un joven sacerdote recién ordenado en un pequeño pueblo mexicano.

programme.title: El ardor
programme.desc: Gael García Bernal protagoniza a un misterioso héroe que emerge de la selva argentina para rescatar a una joven (Alice Braga) y al rancho de su familia, de brutales usurpadores de tierra.

programme.title: Halloween: 20 años después
programme.desc: Hace 20 años, el mal escapó bajo la forma de Michael Myers, lo cual llevó a una sangrienta matanza en Halloween. Ahora, Michael ha vuelto para aterrorizar a una nueva generación, comenzando por la sobreviviente Laurie Strode (Jamie Lee Curtis).
